description: Live zero-shot river-discharge forecast subset: original 42 benchmark picks + Missoula-area + Yellowstone mainstem + ~50 most-paddled free-flowing whitewater runs in the USA
selection_criteria: Top stations by ensemble MAE from upstream mixed-corrected-cache benchmark, plus curated whitewater favorites (American Whitewater style listing) skewed toward snowmelt + free-flowing rivers (no dam-release runs). All gauges on USGS NWIS daily 00060 discharge.
